title: galium decipiens var. depauperatum
intro: Galium decipiens var. depauperatum, also known as Lesser Bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Lesser Bedstraw include its ability to treat minor wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Lesser Bedstraw often involve infusions or teas made from the leaves and stems, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
